[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Alinn Varth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] officer in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] she held the position of [[Rogue Nine/Legends|Rogue Nine]], and along with [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Inyri Forge]], was one of the sub-commanders of the squadron to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Gavin Darklighter]]. She fought at the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]], [[Battle of Ithor]], [[Battle of Kalarba]], and [[Second Battle of Sernpidal]].
